points.text: Context Therapeutics reported 29% confirmed overall response rate (ORR) for CTIM-76, a CLDN6 x CD3 T cell engaging bispecific antibody, in platinum-resistant ovarian cancer (PROC) patients heavily pretreated with a median of 7 prior lines of therapy.

Genmab announced Phase 3 EPCORE DLBCL-4 trial met primary endpoint for epcoritamab (CD3xCD20 bispecific) plus lenalidomide in relapsed/refractory DLBCL, reducing risk of progression/death by 60% (HR 0.40) vs R-GemOx chemotherapy.

European Commission approved Genmab's TEPKINLY (epcoritamab) in combination with lenalidomide and rituximab for relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma, expanding the indication for this CD3xCD20 bispecific antibody.

Context Therapeutics received FDA Fast Track Designation for CTIM-76 bispecific antibody in platinum-resistant ovarian cancer following interim Phase 1 data showing 57% disease control rate at active doses.
VERAXA Biotech initiated cell line development with ATUM for its lead BiTAC-TCE program, a bispecific T-cell engager format, to support IND/CTA-enabling activities.

Johnson & Johnson's CHMP recommendation for TECVAYLI (teclistamab), a bispecific antibody, in combination with daratumumab for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma cites 83% overall survival at three years in treated patients.

Context Therapeutics — CTIM-76 — Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer — Phase 1 interim data: 29% ORR (2/7 evaluable), 57% DCR (4/7) at 140-280µg QW; CRS limited to Grade 1 (11%); FDA Fast Track granted; Q3W dosing planned for 2H 2026.

Genmab — Epcoritamab (TEPKINLY) — Relapsed/Refractory Follicular Lymphoma — European Commission approved combination with lenalidomide and rituximab; Phase 3 EPCORE DLBCL-4 met primary endpoint in DLBCL with 60% PFS risk reduction (HR 0.40) vs R-GemOx.

VERAXA Biotech — BiTAC-TCE program — T-cell engager (bispecific) — Engaged ATUM for stable clonal cell line generation using Leap-In Transposase® technology to advance CMC development and nonclinical supply.

Johnson & Johnson — TECVAYLI (teclistamab) + daratumumab — Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma — CHMP positive opinion for second-line use; Phase 3 data demonstrates durable disease control with >90% of non-progressing patients at 6 months remaining progression-free at 3 years.

Context Therapeutics — Advancing T cell engaging bispecific antibodies for solid tumors — CTIM-76 (CLDN6 x CD3) — Phase 1 ongoing; 29% ORR in PROC; Fast Track designation; planning Q3W dosing expansion in 2027.

Genmab — Commercializing CD3xCD20 bispecific antibody platform — Epcoritamab (TEPKINLY) — EC approval for R/R follicular lymphoma combo; Phase 3 positive in R/R DLBCL (HR 0.40 PFS); global regulatory submissions planned.

VERAXA Biotech — Advancing novel cancer therapies via BiTAC-TCE platform — Lead BiTAC-TCE bispecific program — Initiated cell line development with ATUM following encouraging preclinical data presented at AACR.

Johnson & Johnson — Bispecific antibody standard-of-care establishment — TECVAYLI (teclistamab) + daratumumab — CHMP recommendation for RRMM; leveraging complementary immunotherapy mechanisms to improve long-term survival outcomes.

CTIM-76 — Mechanism: CLDN6 x CD3 T cell engaging bispecific antibody — Phase: 1 — Population: Platinum-resistant ovarian cancer (PROC), testicular, endometrial — Comparator: None (dose-escalation) — Endpoints/Results: 29% confirmed ORR (2/7) at 140–280µg QW; 57% DCR; Grade 1 CRS in 11%.

Epcoritamab — Mechanism: T-cell engaging bispecific antibody (DuoBody-CD3xCD20) — Phase: 3 (EPCORE DLBCL-4) — Population: Relapsed/refractory DLBCL — Comparator: R-GemOx — Results: 60% reduction in risk of progression/death (HR 0.40, p<0.0001); chemotherapy-free regimen.

BiTAC-TCE — Mechanism: Bispecific T-cell engager binding CD3 on T-cells and tumor antigen to redirect cytotoxic T-cells — Phase: Preclinical/IND-enabling — Population: Not specified — Comparator: Conventional T-cell engagers (noted for on-target off-tumor toxicity) — Endpoints: Stable clonal cell line generation for multi-chain antibody formats to improve therapeutic window.

TECVAYLI (teclistamab) + daratumumab — Mechanism: Bispecific-like dual targeting (BCMA/CD3 via teclistamab) combined with CD38 modulation (daratumumab) to enhance T-cell activation and tumor microenvironment — Phase: 3 — Population: Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma (second-line) — Comparator: Standard of care — Results: Statistically significant PFS and OS improvement; 83% overall survival at 3 years.
Genmab — Regulatory filing strategy — TEPKINLY (epcoritamab) — Engaging global authorities for epcoritamab + lenalidomide in DLBCL following Phase 3 success; building on EC approval for FL.
Johnson & Johnson — Regulatory milestone — TECVAYLI (teclistamab) + daratumumab — CHMP positive opinion for RRMM indication; poised for EU approval to establish new treatment standard.

VERAXA Biotech — Partnership with ATUM — BiTAC-TCE program — Contract for cell line development using Leap-In Transposase technology to support IND/CTA-enabling activities for bispecific T-cell engager candidate.
Context Therapeutics — Index inclusion — CTIM-76 — Added to Russell 2000 and Russell 3000 indexes following positive Phase 1 bispecific antibody data.
